type_error_policy: Pycairo runtime TypeError assertions map to MoonBit compile-time rejection. Mutable FontOptions retains its explicit hash method but deliberately lacks the generic Hash and Compare traits; abstract font faces remain unconstructible; and pycairo's optional text-to-glyph cluster result maps to two statically distinct methods.

test_font_options_hashable_protocol.adaptation: FontOptions equality follows mutable option content. Its explicit Cairo hash method remains available, but generic Hash and ordering traits are absent so mutable values cannot be collection keys.
